videoDetails.title: Maple Leaf Rag
videoDetails.shortDescription:
Provided to YouTube by The Orchard Enterprises

Maple Leaf Rag · Scott Joplin

Ragtime With Scott Joplin

℗ 2010 Tam-Tam Media

Released on: 2010-11-01

Music Publisher: S.G.A.E
Music Publisher: Tam-Tam Media

Auto-generated by YouTube.
videoDetails.author: Scott Joplin - Topic

runs.text: Scott Joplin - Best Of Scott Joplin
Bob Newhart’s German Impression Is Incredible | Carson Tonight Show
When 64 Japanese Planes Attacked One P-40 — This Pilot's Solution Left Everyone Speechless
13 American Accents Ranked EASIEST to HARDEST to Understand
Epic Duelling Piano Scene (HD) from Scott Joplin (1977) | TUNE
1 MIN AGO: Supreme Court Ends Trump’s Final Appeal — Buffett BREAKS SILENCE
Rodney Dangerfield Has Dom DeLuise Rolling On the Floor Laughing (1974)
Why Planes Disappear in the Bermuda Triangle
